content:
Hey all, apologies I completely missed the status update today -- but this is probably a good time to ask whether we should still have it.

On the Jco side, there were some reported issues & fixes that prompted some releases of js-component-bindgen and jco after that, but so far there haven't been any big changes -- and I don't have anything in particular to report.

The PR for making component-model tests work is still open (not much progress has been made there), and I'm prioritizing some older fixes/refactoring and dealing with any reported issues that show up!

Also, if anyone wants to still have the p3 status update meeting, speak now or forever hold your peace!

I will remove the meeting from the calendar tomorrow if no one says anything -- otherwise I think we can discuss spec stuff in the thursday soon-to-be-a-SIG meetings
